title: Scale a StatefulSet and verify stable pod identity
scenario: The `postgres` StatefulSet was accidentally deployed with only 1 replica. The application expects a 3-node cluster with pods named `postgres-0`, `postgres-1`, and `postgres-2`, each backed by its own 1Gi persistent volume from the `fast-ssd` StorageClass. Scale the StatefulSet to 3 replicas and confirm each pod gets a stable identity and its own PVC.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: default
spec:
  serviceName: postgres
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: postgres
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: postgres
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: postgres
        image: postgres:15-alpine
        env:
        - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
          value: "changeme"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
        volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: data
    spec:
      storageClassName: fast-ssd
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: default
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: postgres
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432

objectives.description: `volumeClaimTemplates` defines storage request of at least `1Gi`

hints.text: The only change needed is `replicas: 1` → `replicas: 3`. StatefulSets create pods one at a time in order — postgres-0 must be Running before postgres-1 starts.
The `volumeClaimTemplates` section automatically provisions a PVC named `data-postgres-0`, `data-postgres-1`, `data-postgres-2` for each pod. You do not need to create PVCs manually.
If a pod is stuck, check `kubectl describe pvc data-postgres-1`. The `fast-ssd` StorageClass is already provisioned in the hidden setup — the PVC should bind automatically.

solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: default
spec:
  serviceName: postgres
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: postgres
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: postgres
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: postgres
        image: postgres:15-alpine
        env:
        - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
          value: "changeme"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
        volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: data
    spec:
      storageClassName: fast-ssd
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: default
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: postgres
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
